title: SQL order by <column number> only sorts on first call
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testorder (a String, b String, c Nullable(Int32), d Float32, e Nullable(Date));
SELECT * FROM testorder ORDER BY a;
SELECT * FROM testorder ORDER BY b;
SELECT * FROM testorder WHERE c IS NULL ORDER BY c;
key_bug_features: SQL order by column number fails on subsequent calls
